findings.title: Failure State 2 points to a command that does not create config.env
findings.detail: The updated prerequisite guidance tells users to run `/specflow.setup` when `.specflow/config.env` is missing, but the current implementation of `global/specflow.setup.md` only edits `CLAUDE.md` and stops if `CLAUDE.md` is absent. The file that actually initializes `.specflow/config.env` is still `bin/specflow-init`. Fix by changing recovery command to `specflow-init` or implementing config.env bootstrap in `/specflow.setup`.

findings.title: New-user setup flow omits the project initialization step
findings.detail: README flow says ./bin/specflow-install -> npx specy init -> /specflow.setup, but never tells user to run specflow-init which copies .specflow/config.env and CLAUDE.md. SC-003 not met.

findings.title: Cross-command prerequisite changes have no regression coverage
findings.detail: Nine command files plus README changed with no automated regression test or recorded verification covering the two failure states.

findings.title: Copied recovery guidance sends every non-main command back to /specflow
findings.detail: The step-format message tells users to rerun /specflow after fixing the prerequisite, but for standalone phase/fix/review commands this restarts the workflow from spec creation instead of resuming the command the user actually invoked.
